history.text: Principality of Moldavia ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Bessarabia Governorate appears in Moldova's historical record.
Moldavian Democratic Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
Union with Romania tied the territory into a wider political structure.
Moldavian ASSR placed the territory inside the Soviet administrative system.
Moldavian SSR placed the territory inside the Soviet administrative system.
Transnistria War was a major conflict in Moldova's modern political history.
Moldova became independent from the Soviet Union, marking a key step in modern statehood.

worthSeeing.title: Milestii Mici:
worthSeeing.text: The world's largest wine cellar by volume, with 200 km of underground tunnels.

worthSeeing.title: Orheiul Vechi:
worthSeeing.text: A cave monastery in a limestone canyon inhabited since ancient Dacian times.

worthSeeing.title: Wine Culture:
worthSeeing.text: Moldova has one of the highest vineyard-to-land ratios in the world.
